product: Dashboard custom dimensions and pivot table improvements
tagline: Custom dimensions: Authors can create custom dimensions on AI/BI dashboards.
what_it_does: Custom dimensions: Authors can create custom dimensions on AI/BI dashboards. A new set of functions, including CASE WHEN statements, CONCAT, COALESCE, and others, are now supported. Customizable pivot table widths: Pivot tables now support customizable widths.
why_it_matters: Sankey visualization improvements: Sankey visualizations now have reduced flickering on hover and use a lighter gray for flow lines.

capabilities.title: The optional INCLUSIVE keyword includes
capabilities.desc: The optional INCLUSIVE keyword includes the current row in the range. EXCLUSIVE excludes it. Defaults to EXCLUSIVE.

capabilities.title: Example: TRAILING 7 DAY INCLUSIVE
capabilities.desc: Example: TRAILING 7 DAY INCLUSIVE or LEADING 1 MONTH

key_takeaway: Custom dimensions: Authors can create custom dimensions on AI/BI dashboards.
